[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101100010 4
1 1000100100 3
2 1100011010 5
3 0000100001 2
4 1001000011 4
5 1010000101 4
6 1011101100 6
7 0000101110 4

70 07 0101000010 3
